session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**PR #9382**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9382
### Changes
**`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/dependency_graph.py`** - Added `simulate_next_n(count)` method to `DependencyGraph` — repeatedly finds the next unblocked pending node, marks it done in a working copy, and repeats. Returns original pending-status nodes in execution order. Pure function, no mutation.
**`src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_execute_plan.py`** (new) - `erk exec objective-execute-plan <objective_number> --count N [--json]` - Fetches and validates the objective, simulates N nodes in dependency order, outputs numbered execution plan in text or JSON
**`src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py`** - Registered `objective-execute-plan` command
**`tests/unit/gateway/github/metadata/test_dependency_graph.py`** - 8 new tests for `simulate_next_n()`: linear chain, cross-phase unblocking, requesting more than available, skipping non-pending nodes, already-satisfied deps, empty complete graph, count=1 matching `next_node()`, and immutability
**`tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_execute_plan.py`** (new) - 6 tests covering JSON output structure, dependency ordering, resolved < requested behavior, text output format, not-found error, and all-done objective
